forecasts.reasoning: As of the knowledge cutoff date of June 15, 2025, President Trump is currently attending the G7 summit in Canada (June 15-17). While he accepted an invitation from President Xi Jinping during a phone call on June 5, 2025, no date or timeline was set for the visit. Preparatory aide-level trade talks took place in London from June 9-13, which typically indicates that a presidential-level summit is still weeks or months away. There have been no logistical announcements or public schedule updates regarding a trip to China for the remaining 13 days of June. Historical first-year presidential visits to China and the massive logistical requirements for such a trip make a visit before July 1, 2025, highly improbable given the lack of notice.
